#+title: Go (programming language)
#+filetags: :dev:lang:

Go is a statically typed language from Google, good for
[[id:11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111][Programming]] servers.

#+begin_src go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	fmt.Println("hello, orgo")
}
#+end_src

Used by the [[id:55555555-5555-4555-8555-555555555555][orgo project]].

| feature    | verdict |
|------------+---------|
| simplicity | yes     |
| generics   | finally |
